clusters.justification: This dimension captures the overarching process of evaluating valence, physiological arousal, and threat, mapping reliably onto the brain's extended allostatic and salience-processing neurobiological systems.

These terms reflect the computation of subjective utility, action-selection, and goal-directed drive, anchoring functionally onto macroscopic mesolimbic and ventromedial prefrontal reward circuitries.

This domain encompasses internally-directed associative thought regarding oneself and other conceptual agents, typically subserved by cortical midline and temporoparietal hubs of the default mode network.
